description_long: This house complex features a main two-story rectangular building with a simple, modern facade, flanked by a detached garage and a smaller outbuilding. The main house has a flat front with symmetrical windows and a central entryway, while the garage and outbuilding have gable roofs. The property is enclosed by a low wall and includes a paved driveway leading to the garage, with a truck parked beside it. The yard is mostly grass, with minimal landscaping and a clear separation between the buildings. The overall design is functional and unadorned, with a focus on practicality and straightforward geometry.
description: A modern, two-story house with a detached garage and outbuilding, set on a rectangular grassy lot with a paved driveway and minimal exterior decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house facade, central entryway, garage to the left, and outbuilding to the right, all set behind a low wall.
description_view_1: Side view from the street, highlighting the garage and driveway entrance, with the main house and outbuilding visible in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main house, the truck parked beside the garage, and the outbuilding at the far end of the lot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the outbuilding and the rear of the garage, with the main house in the background.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a simple door, small steps, and no porch or decorative columns.
